title: thymus vulgaris subsp. palearensis
intro: Thymus vulgaris subsp. palearensis, also known as the Pale Thyme, is a subspecies of the Thyme plant native to the Mediterranean region. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pale Thyme include its ability to soothe coughs and colds, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Pale Thyme can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or used in tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
